disclaimer: demo data — fictionalised availability/prices for POC only. H&S brokers third-party developer inventory under official mandate.

projects.name: Marina Horizon at Emaar Beachfront
projects.developerTrackRecord: Dubai's flagship developer; Downtown, Dubai Marina, Dubai Hills
projects.roiNotes: Prime gated island; capital appreciation-led, ~5–6% yields, very strong resale among HNW buyers
comparisons: vs Creek Harbour: Beachfront is sea-and-marina facing with private beach; Creek is skyline-and-creek facing

faqs.q: Is this a good store of value?
faqs.a: Emaar Beachfront has been among the most resilient resale markets in Dubai; we treat it as a blue-chip hold.

projects.name: Creekside Vista at Dubai Creek Harbour
projects.roiNotes: Master-planned waterfront district; appreciation play anchored by the future Dubai Creek Tower
comparisons: vs Emaar Beachfront: lower entry, creek setting rather than beach, longer build horizon

projects.name: Costa Brava at DAMAC Lagoons
projects.developerTrackRecord: Major Dubai developer; DAMAC Hills, Safa One
projects.roiNotes: Family end-user demand; villa segment with strong rental and appreciation in the master community
comparisons: vs Nshama Town Square: Lagoons is more resort-styled and higher-priced; Town Square is value family living

projects.name: Safa Gate by DAMAC
projects.roiNotes: Branded-residence premium on SZR; central location supports both yield and appreciation
comparisons: vs Emaar Beachfront: more central/urban SZR address vs beachfront island

projects.name: Madinat Jumeirah Living — Phase Collection
projects.developerTrackRecord: Master-developer of JBR, Business Bay, Madinat Jumeirah Living
projects.roiNotes: Walkable to Madinat Jumeirah & Burj Al Arab; scarce supply supports premium resale
comparisons: vs Creek Harbour: more established, beach-district address, nearer handover
sellingPoints: walk to Madinat Jumeirah souk & beach

projects.name: Town Square Park Residences by Nshama
projects.location: Town Square Dubai, Al Qudra Road
projects.roiNotes: Value family community; ~6–7% yields, strong end-user occupancy
comparisons: vs DAMAC Lagoons: more affordable family living, less resort-themed

faqs.a: Yes — it's our most accessible mandate, with a relaxed handover-weighted plan and reliable tenant demand.

projects.name: Golf Vista at Dubai Hills Estate
projects.roiNotes: Mature green master-community between Downtown and Marina; balanced yield + appreciation
comparisons: vs Town Square: more premium green community, higher entry, stronger appreciation
